name: CMN Substrate
synopsis: Shared Rust library for CMN — data models, cryptographic verification, tree hashing, URI parsing, and JSON schema validation used by both Hypha and Synapse
intent: Provide the common foundation shared between Hypha (client) and Synapse (indexer): spore/mycelium data models, Ed25519 signature verification, BLAKE3 content hashing, CMN URI parsing, and spore.core.json schema validation
mutations: Consolidate file traversal into DirReader trait — substrate drives walk logic with exclude_names and follow_rules filtering, callers provide I/O via trait implementation
Re-export should_exclude from tree module for downstream symlink validation
Reject symlinks in archive extraction with Malicious error, add is_malicious() helper to ExtractError
Sync spore-core.json schema: forbid spawned_from/absorbed_from bonds, add exclude_names/follow_rules descriptions

bonds.reason: Implements core CMN data structures and verification logic per the specification
